title: Charlotte Weekend Weather: Mild with Rising Fire Danger
summary: A mild weekend is expected with highs in the mid-80s, but a continued dry spell increases the risk of fire.
charlotte_impact: Residents should be aware of the fire risk and take precautions to prevent wildfires during the dry conditions.

title: Man Sentenced to 9 Years for Charlotte Apartment Shooting
summary: Robert Dale Emerson Jr. received a 9-year sentence for firing into an occupied Charlotte apartment in 2023, endangering a family.
charlotte_impact: The sentencing highlights the consequences of gun violence and its impact on community safety.

title: Community Honors Shooting Victim as Husband Faces Murder Charge
summary: Hundreds gathered to celebrate Tammy McCollum's life with a balloon release on her birthday, while her husband is charged with her murder.
charlotte_impact: The event demonstrates community support for the victim's family during a difficult time.

title: Benefit Concert to Aid Hit-and-Run Amputation Victim
summary: A benefit concert at The Rooster in Gastonia on May 1 will support a man who lost a limb in a hit-and-run.
charlotte_impact: The concert showcases community solidarity and support for a local resident in need.

title: Victim Airlifted After Plane Crash Near Lincoln County Airport
summary: A person was seriously injured and airlifted after a plane crash near Lincolnton-Lincoln County Regional Airport around 5:30 p.m.
charlotte_impact: The incident raises concerns about aviation safety in the Lincoln County area.

title: Winthrop Softball Team Honors Inspiring Fifth Grader
summary: Raegan Hornung, an 11-year-old legally blind and hearing impaired, is honored by Winthrop University's softball team for her inspiring journey.
charlotte_impact: Raegan's story highlights the power of resilience and the positive impact of community engagement.

title: Hornets' Playoff Return Boosts Charlotte Businesses
summary: Local shops and restaurants are experiencing increased sales as the Hornets' postseason appearance brings excitement to Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The playoff return provides a welcome economic stimulus for local businesses.

title: DHS Threatens Customs Pullout from 'Sanctuary City' Airports; Charlotte at Risk?
summary: Potential removal of federal customs officials from airports in cities with sanctuary policies could halt international air travel, impacting Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The potential policy change could significantly affect international travel and commerce in Charlotte.

title: Charlotte Road Closure Frustrates Businesses, Locals
summary: The closure of South Cedar Street near Uptown Charlotte has caused frustration for businesses and residents due to lengthy construction delays.
charlotte_impact: The road closure disrupts daily commutes and negatively impacts local businesses.

title: Victim Dies After Northeast Charlotte Shooting
summary: A person has died following a shooting on McCullough Drive near North Tryon Street in northeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The incident underscores the ongoing issue of gun violence in the Charlotte area.

title: Woman Pleads Guilty in Deadly DWI Crash on I-77
summary: Maria Leonard was sentenced to prison for a DWI crash on Interstate 77 in May 2025 that resulted in a fatality.
charlotte_impact: The sentencing highlights the severe consequences of drunk driving.

title: Cornelius Community Remembers Missing Teen on 15th Birthday
summary: The Cornelius community honors Madalina Cojocari on her 15th birthday as the investigation into her 2022 disappearance continues.
charlotte_impact: The community's remembrance underscores the ongoing search and hope for Madalina's safe return.

title: 1 Seriously Hurt in Northwest Charlotte Shooting
summary: One person sustained serious injuries in a shooting along Brookshire Boulevard near Interstate 85 in northwest Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The shooting adds to concerns about public safety in the northwest Charlotte area.

title: Abandoned Puppies Reunited with Mother in Gaston County
summary: Eight puppies found abandoned in a cardboard box in Gaston County have been reunited with their mother; a suspect faces charges.
charlotte_impact: The incident highlights animal welfare concerns and the importance of responsible pet ownership.

title: 1 Dead After Shooting in Kannapolis
summary: A man is facing a voluntary manslaughter charge following a fatal shooting on Sears Street in Kannapolis.
charlotte_impact: The shooting contributes to concerns about violent crime in the Kannapolis area.
